description: n-auth.com appears to be nextAuth, an authentication and identity service. Its published API covers sessions, registration, users, accounts, servers, transactions, and management of permissions, roles, and API keys.
summary: n-auth.com exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the nextAuth REST API at `https://api.nextauth.com/`, authenticated with an `X-apikey` header and optionally an `X-su` impersonation header.
